Overview Quick start Schema architecture Interactive samples Root schema example extends extensions link metadata presentation purpose rich-text status component pattern style theme token accessibility anatomy api best-practice content design-specifications guideline interaction motion principle scale state variant

2 definitions in this file:

  • useCase
  • purpose
 Describes the scenario. Should be concrete and situation-driven — describe the user's situation, not the artifact's features. Whether the use case is an example to follow or to avoid. The recommended alternative artifact for this scenario. Typically provided for whenNotToUse entries to direct the reader toward a more appropriate component, pattern, or token. References: richText Identifies this guideline as a purpose spec. Scenario-driven guidance describing when this artifact is or is not the right choice. References: useCase

Design System Documentation Standard (DSDS) 0.1 — Draft Specification
